creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nox
Date: Sun Jan 20 15:11:34 2013
New Revision: 310693
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310693

Log:
  Create sys symlinks properly if restarting a build.
  
  PR:		ports/174030
  Submitted by:	Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/emulators/kqemu-kmod-devel/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/emulators/kqemu-kmod/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/emulators/kqemu-kmod-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/emulators/kqemu-kmod-devel/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 15:09:48 2013	(r310692)
+++ head/emulators/kqemu-kmod-devel/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 15:11:34 2013	(r310693)
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ post-patch:
 .endif
 
 do-build:
-	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} beforedepend && ${LN} -s @/sys sys)
+	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} beforedepend && ${LN} -sfh @/sys sys)
 	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}/common; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} Makefile ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
 	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${ALL_TARGET})
 

Modified: head/emulators/kqemu-kmod/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/emulators/kqemu-kmod/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 15:09:48 2013	(r310692)
+++ head/emulators/kqemu-kmod/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 15:11:34 2013	(r310693)
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ post-patch:
 .endif
 
 do-build:
-	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} beforedepend && ${LN} -s @/sys sys)
+	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} beforedepend && ${LN} -sfh @/sys sys)
 	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}/common; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} Makefile ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
 	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${ALL_TARGET})
